blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 52°F.
Wednesday: 7" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
